meaning: n.[宗]<<腓利门书>>(<<圣约·新约>>中的一卷)
examples: He was an unfaithful servant when he fled from his master Philemon.
Philemon 1:4 I thank my God, making mention of thee always in my prayers.
Philemon 1 : 12 Whom I have sent again: thou therefore receive him, that is, mine own bowels.
Philemon has now made his way to Cairo, home to hundreds of former kidnap victims like him.
Four months on, and Philemon Semere, who was interviewed by the BBC's Mike Thomson, is still being held there.
